creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey all,

I would close this, but I think we have an unresolved issue, with two 
possible solutions:

- Remove the warning on deinstall about USERS
- Add a warning on deinstall about GROUPS (but change wording of both).

The current situation is a little absurd, where users are warned about 
but not groups...

Chris

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.
